subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, the Single One, the All-Informed. The eyes have been prevented from beholding Mine horizon, and the tongues [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله الفرد الخبیر قد منعت العیون عن مشاهده افقی و الالسن
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations
